description: Playbook adapter for the shared _stack Codex inbox/worktree runner.

notes: Docs-only and governance-doc tasks should stay inside the documented mutation surfaces.
Fresh worktrees do not carry repo-local node_modules, so verification bootstrap runs before declared verify commands.
If command or workflow state changes, also run pnpm agents:update and pnpm agents:check before promotion.

docsUpdateRules: If command or workflow state changes, keep README.md, docs/commands/README.md, docs/PLAYBOOK_PRODUCT_ROADMAP.md, and docs/CHANGELOG.md aligned in the same change or immediately after.
Keep Playbook Codex execution repo-local in this phase; do not edit _stack, Atlas, Lifeline, or Fitness from Playbook tasks.
Prefer Playbook command outputs over broad repository inference when command coverage exists.
